entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) known for its relative tolerance to saline soils

entities.name: SOIL SALINITY
entities.description: The presence of excessive salts in the soil, widespread in arid and semi-arid regions

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant genotype to maintain growth and productivity in saline soil conditions

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop (Zea mays) that is less tolerant to salinity compared to pearl millet

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of crops that are less tolerant to salinity compared to pearl millet

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where saline soils are widespread

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating germplasm to identify genotypes with superior tolerance

entities.name: CULTURAL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Agricultural practices used alongside tolerant lines to improve productivity in saline soils

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield and performance in a given environment

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Genetic variations of a species used for identifying superior traits
